section.title: Feedback loop
section.subtitle: Active memory from user feedback and management of collected corrections.

memory.title: Feedback-memory active
memory.descPre: When active, feedback with corrections is vectorised and re-injected into the system prompt on similar future requests, so the agent avoids repeating the same mistakes. On activation the collection
memory.noVectorDB: No vector DB reachable: configure a Vector DB and Embedding to enable memory.
